orgContent.html:
题目

You are given two non-empty linked lists representing two non-negative integers. The digits are stored in reverse order and each of their nodes contain a single digit. Add the two numbers and return it as a linked list.

You may assume the two numbers do not contain any leading zero, except the number 0 itself.

Example:

Input: (2 -> 4 -> 3) + (5 -> 6 -> 4) Output: 7 -> 0 -> 8 Explanation: 342 + 465 = 807.

思路

从例子中看出，链表中离表头越近的节点为数字值的低位。那么同时，遍历两个链表，相加相同的位，产生一个可能的进位给高位使用。

循环

  1. 两个链表必须都被遍历完，时间复杂度为 \(O(n+m)\)
  2. 循环的终止条件为：linkA = null and linkB = null and 进位为0
  3. 定义一个求和函数 int add(ListNode left, ListNode right, ListNode sum) 用来计算两个节点的值，并返回进位；
  4. 定义一个遍历下一个节点用的 ListNode next(ListNode node) 函数;
  5. 每次遍历构建新节点时，需要将前一个节点的 next 设定为当前节点。因此构建一个头节点，可以简化代码流程；
  6. 最后返回 root.next;
/**
 ,* Definition for singly-linked list.
 ,* public class ListNode {
 ,*     int val;
 ,*     ListNode next;
 ,*     ListNode(int x) { val = x; }
 ,* }
 ,*/
class Solution {
public ListNode addTwoNumbers(ListNode l1, ListNode l2) {
        ListNode head = new ListNode(0);
        ListNode pre = head;
        int carry = 0;
        while (l1 != null || l2 != null || carry != 0) {
            ListNode current = new ListNode(carry);
            pre.next = current;
            carry = add(l1, l2, current);
            l1 = next(l1);
            l2 = next(l2);
            pre = next(pre);
        }
        return head.next;
    }
}

int add(ListNode left, ListNode right, ListNode sum)

int add(ListNode left, ListNode right, ListNode sum) {
	if (left != null) {
	    sum.val += left.val;
	}
	if (right != null) {
	    sum.val += right.val;
	}
	if (sum.val > 9) {
	    sum.val %= 10;
	    return 1;
	}
	return 0;
    }

ListNode next(ListNode node)

ListNode next(ListNode node) {
    if (node == null) {
        return null;
    }
    return node.next;
}
